title: thymus leptophyllus subsp. godayanus
intro: Thymus leptophyllus subsp. godayanus, commonly known as Thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. Thyme has been used to alleviate various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin infections, due to its ability to soothe and protect the body. Thyme can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and capsules, allowing for its benefits to be utilized in different ways.
